title: Sous-Vide Penne Garlic Crunch
description: A garlicky, crunchy one-pot Spanish dish featuring penne rigate, prepared with sous-vide cooking method and nut-free-friendly.
instructions: Heat the extra virgin olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Drain the penne rigate from the water and add it to the skillet with red pepper flakes and fresh basil leaves.
Shake off any excess oil from the drained pasta, then toss it with the garlic mixture for 1 minute.
Transfer the cooked pasta into a bowl and let it cool slightly before serving.
